sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27315" key="*dio/spuros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Διόσ-πυρος</orth> and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Διοσ-πώγων</orth>, <sense id="n27315.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διοσ-.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
